source.name: AstroGuide COBS/Horizons comet snapshot
source.notes: Data-lab package candidate. Wraps the generated comet seed and ephemeris payloads in the dynamic metadata package envelope.

source.selection: Top 20 COBS active/observed comets by current magnitude that resolved in Horizons and reached magnitude 18 or brighter in 2026 from a candidate pool of 66.

comets.shortDescription: Active observed comet selected from COBS current-magnitude data; ephemeris generated from JPL Horizons target 10P/Tempel 2.
comets.magnitudeContext: Sampled brightness in this generated ephemeris is about magnitude 17.5, spanning roughly 13.1 to 20.0 across the 2026 ephemeris.
